Interface SimonCompiler<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of model being built
All Known Implementing Classes:
SimonCompilerAntlrImpl
public interface SimonCompiler<T>
Base class for Simon compilers. This base class is agnostic to actual compiler implementation. Compilation in general operates on a set of inputs. Symbol resolution can take the multiple inputs into account in order to resolve symbol references. Compiling a single input is a special case, where the set of inputs size 1.
